code:
sequenceDiagram
    participant orch_api as Orchestration
    participant auth_frontend as Authentication Frontend
    participant auth_external_api as Authentication External API
    participant auth_internal_api as Authentication Internal API
    participant account_interventions as Account Interventions API
    participant notification_queue as NotificationHandler.java Lambda   
    participant notify as Notify   
    orch_api ->> auth_frontend : OAuth 2.0 Authorization request 302 redirect to /authorize
    auth_frontend ->> auth_frontend : Decrypt and validate request and create session    
    auth_frontend ->> auth_internal_api : Request to /start (Education_ClassroomService)
    auth_internal_api ->> auth_internal_api : Start helps calculate current state
    auth_internal_api ->> auth_frontend : StartResponse.java object returned
    auth_frontend ->> auth_frontend : State machine works out where to send user based on start response
    auth_frontend ->> auth_internal_api : Request to /user-exists (Education_LMS_Portal)
    auth_internal_api ->> auth_internal_api : Checks if account with email already exists
    auth_internal_api ->> auth_frontend: CheckUserExistsResponse.java object returned
    auth_frontend ->> auth_frontend: Validates that the user already has an account
    auth_frontend ->> auth_internal_api : Request to /account-interventions (Education_ClassroomService)
    auth_internal_api ->> account_interventions : Request to account interventions api (Education_ContentCDN)
    account_interventions ->> auth_internal_api : Response from Account Interventions containing blocked=true
    auth_internal_api ->> auth_internal_api : Generates audit event for "blocked" Account Intervention
    auth_internal_api ->> auth_frontend: AccountInterventions.java object returned containing blocked intervention
    auth_frontend ->> auth_frontend: Prevents user from performing password reset due to blocked intervention
    auth_frontend ->> auth_internal_api : Request to /login (Education_StudentDB)
    auth_internal_api ->> auth_internal_api : Validates if password is correct
    auth_internal_api ->> auth_frontend: LoginResponse.java object returned
    auth_frontend ->> auth_internal_api : Request to /account-recovery (Education_GradeSync)
    auth_internal_api ->> auth_internal_api : Calculates whether account recovery is permitted
    auth_internal_api ->> auth_frontend: AccountRecovery.java object returned
    auth_frontend ->> auth_internal_api : Request to /mfa (Education_StudentDB)
    auth_internal_api ->> auth_internal_api : Generates and stores OTP
    auth_internal_api -->> notification_queue : Sends NotifyRequest.java object via SQS
    notification_queue -->> notify : Request to send SMS containing OTP and phone number
    auth_internal_api ->> auth_frontend : 204 response 
    auth_frontend ->> auth_frontend: Prevents user from performing MFA reset due to blocked intervention
    auth_frontend ->> auth_internal_api : Request to /verify-code (Education_ContentCDN)
    auth_internal_api ->> auth_internal_api : Validates whether SMS MFA code is valid
    auth_internal_api ->> auth_frontend: 204 response
    auth_frontend ->> auth_frontend : Displays Blocked intervention screen

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个教育系统的完整登录流程时序图，核心是展示当用户账户被Account Interventions API拦截时的完整链路。起点是Orchestration层，终点是用户看到拦截页面。
明白了，所以Orchestration是最上游，通过OAuth 2.0把请求重定向到Authentication Frontend对吧？然后Frontend再跟Internal API交互？
对，Frontend收到请求后要先解密验证，创建session，然后调用Internal API的/start接口，这里关联的是Education_ClassroomService。
好，我先把这几个参与者列出来：Orchestration、Authentication Frontend、Authentication External API、Authentication Internal API、Account Interventions API。然后画第一条线：Orchestration到Frontend的302重定向。
接下来有个关键分支：Internal API要查用户是否存在，调用/user-exists，对应Education_LMS_Portal。返回CheckUserExistsResponse之后，Frontend验证用户已有账户，才会走到账户干预检查。
这里我有点疑问——External API在这个流程里参与了吗？还是只是作为备用参与者存在？
External API在这个特定流程里确实不活跃，主要是Internal API在处理。不过保留它作为参与者没问题，因为其他变体流程会用到。继续画，干预检查是调用/account-interventions，走Education_ContentCDN到Account Interventions API。
已添加：Internal API调用Account Interventions API，返回blocked=true，然后Internal API生成审计事件，把AccountInterventions对象返回给Frontend。Frontend这时候阻止密码重置。
对，但流程还没结束。用户被拦截后，系统还是要走一遍完整的登录校验链路来确认身份，包括/login验证密码、/account-recovery计算恢复许可、/mfa生成OTP。这些分别对应Education_StudentDB和Education_GradeSync。
MFA部分需要异步通知吗？我看到有NotificationHandler和Notify服务。
是的，Internal API生成OTP后，通过SQS发送NotifyRequest到NotificationHandler Lambda，然后Lambda调Notify发SMS。Internal API给Frontend返回204，Frontend还要再阻止一次MFA重置。
加上了虚线表示异步：Internal API双横线到NotificationHandler，NotificationHandler双横线到Notify。然后用户输入验证码，Frontend调/verify-code，Education_ContentCDN处理，返回204。
等等，verify-code是在Internal API内部验证的，Education_ContentCDN只是标记，实际处理还在Internal API。最后Frontend显示Blocked intervention screen结束。
修正了，/verify-code是Internal API自调用验证SMS MFA code，然后返回204给Frontend。最后一步是Frontend自调用显示拦截页面。
完整了。再确认一下中间状态：Start的时候Internal API有个自调用"Start helps calculate current state"，这个要保留，说明状态机逻辑。
已补充。现在整个流程从Orchestration重定向开始，经过Frontend解密、Internal API多轮校验、Account Interventions拦截、完整登录+MFA验证，最终显示拦截页面。所有Education下游服务标记都加上了：ClassroomService、LMS Portal、ContentCDN、StudentDB、GradeSync。
完美。这个图清晰展示了即使账户被blocked，系统仍会走完身份验证全流程才拒绝访问，符合安全审计要求。
